events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: copper-to-steel transition with no dielectric union. This is a code/manufacturer requirement to prevent galvanic corrosion. At rough-complete stage, this is a defect. Decision: fail. Risk: medium (corrosion over time, potential leak). Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant.

"findings": [
"Copper-to-steel transition made without a dielectric union or listed dielectric fitting",
"Direct dissimilar-metal contact will drive galvanic corrosion of the steel side",
"Non-compliant with IPC provisions and manufacturer transition requirements"
],
"actions": [
"Cut out the direct copper-to-steel connection",
"Install a listed dielectric union or approved dielectric transition fitting",
"Re-inspect the transition before closing the wall"
],
"rationale": "Copper directly connected to steel without a dielectric barrier creates a galvanic cell that corrodes the steel and can leak; prescriptive code and manufacturer listings require an approved dielectric transition at dissimilar-metal joints.",

"IPC — water piping installation / dissimilar metal transitions",
"Manufacturer listings for dielectric unions and transition fittings"
]
